overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person exploration of a vibrant futuristic shanty town and market district. The player character walks through covered market walkways, bright open plazas, and an outdoor gym area while observing NPCs engaging in daily activities, socializing, and fighting.

events.description: camera tilts down from looking up at skyscrapers to market level
entering darker covered corridor with yellow and black striped walls

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market area, observing stalls and NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC kneeling near market stall containers

entered.detail: thick wooden structural beams forming a canopy overhead
tall red industrial tower with pipes and scaffolding
makeshift market stalls built from shipping containers
industrial building with distinctive yellow and black hazard stripes
wide concrete staircase leading upward

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view looking up at towering structures, then transitions to walking through a covered market walkway with wooden overhead beams. The player moves past container-based market stalls and enters a darker corridor with yellow and black striped industrial walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: large interior transit hall with industrial architecture

events.description: dramatic light beams stream through overhead gaps creating striped shadows
approaching exit doorway leading to bright outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: moving through large interior hall toward the exit

notable_agents.action: NPC walking in the distance toward the exit

entered.detail: spacious industrial hall with high ceilings and metal catwalks
elevated metal walkway with railings on the right side
large archway leading to bright exterior

segments.scene_description: Walking through a vast interior industrial hall with dramatic lighting creating striped shadows on the floor. The player approaches a bright exit archway while passing metal catwalks and yellow-black striped walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central watchtower and food vendors

events.description: exiting building into bright sunlight of open plaza
turning right to walk past food stalls and vendor kiosks

agents.ego_description: emerging into bright plaza and turning right past food vendors

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs walking together in same direction

entered.detail: tall yellow and black industrial watchtower with multiple levels
green painted food vendor kiosk with menu displays
blue and red neon sign reading OPEN
large pyramid-shaped building with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark interior into a bright sunlit plaza dominated by a distinctive yellow and black watchtower. Turning right, the camera passes green food vendor kiosks and groups of pedestrians while the pyramid-shaped building looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market bazaar with canvas tents and seating areas

events.description: two NPCs engaged in hand-to-hand combat in a makeshift fighting ring
moving from social seating area toward outdoor gym entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through market area observing NPCs socializing and fighting

notable_agents.action: two NPCs fighting in a ring while others watch

entered.detail: large canvas tent covering market stalls and seating
red upholstered couches and chairs arranged for socializing
open concrete area serving as an informal fighting ring
tall metal cage surrounding the fighting area

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered market bazaar with canvas tents and red outdoor furniture where NPCs lounge and socialize. The camera passes a makeshift fighting ring where two characters are engaged in combat, surrounded by a metal cage structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air street gym with weightlifting equipment

events.description: entering outdoor gym area with weightlifting equipment and benches
turning left past weight racks toward exit

agents.ego_description: walking through outdoor gym observing NPCs working out with weights

notable_agents.action: NPC performing barbell squats with heavy weights

entered.detail: various weightlifting machines and free weights arranged outdoors
heavy barbell with large weight plates on the ground
illuminated sign reading SWEAT EXCELLENCE on yellow wall
red heavy punching bag hanging from metal frame
yellow painted concrete barriers blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an open-air street gym where NPCs lift weights and exercise. The player passes barbell equipment, a red punching bag, and a 'SWEAT EXCELLENCE' sign before heading toward yellow concrete barriers marking the exit of the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of an industrial market into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban plaza and fitness area. It begins by looking up at towering structures before moving through a covered walkway of wooden beams and container stalls, eventually descending into a dark corridor with yellow and black striped walls. As the camera traverses a vast industrial hall filled with dramatic striped shadows, it pushes toward a bright exit archway that opens into a vivid, sunlit plaza dominated by a yellow and black watchtower. The scene then shifts into a bustling bazaar of canvas tents and red furniture, passing a caged fighting ring where characters engage in combat before turning toward an open-air street gym. Finally, the movement glides past weightlifting equipment and a red punching bag under a Sweat Excellence sign, ending at yellow concrete barriers.
